name: Veracruz All Natural
n: Best breakfast tacos in Austin. The migas taco is iconic.
addr: 1704 E Cesar Chavez St, Austin TX

name: Uchiko
n: Chef Paul Qui's Japanese farmhouse. Reserve ahead.

name: Comedor
n: Contemporary Mexican in a stunning open-air atrium.

name: Franklin Barbecue
n: The most famous BBQ in the world. Arrive very early.

name: Terry Black's BBQ
n: No insane lines, still world-class brisket and ribs.

name: Aba Austin
n: The garlic hummus is life-changing. Most-reviewed Med in Austin.

name: Taqueria De Diez
n: A taco speakeasy — walk through the bar to find it.

name: Ember Kitchen
n: Fire-driven Latin. Short rib with polenta is unforgettable.
addr: 800 W Cesar Chavez St, Austin TX

name: Craft Omakase
n: Perfect 5.0 rating. Most special dinner in Austin.

name: The Vegan Nom
n: Best vegan tacos in Austin, hands down.
addr: 2324 E Cesar Chavez St, Austin TX

name: Kemuri Tatsu-ya
n: Japanese izakaya meets Texas BBQ. Completely one-of-a-kind.

name: Nixta Taqueria
n: Michelin-recognized. Handmade tortillas and creative fillings.

name: Tikka House
n: Best butter chicken in Austin. The lemon rice is incredible.

name: Odd Duck
n: Farm-to-table small plates. Menu changes with the seasons.

name: Hestia
n: Michelin Star. Everything cooked over open wood fire. Stunning.

name: Red Ash
n: Fire-kissed Italian in a sleek downtown tower. Consistently top-rated.

name: Fonda San Miguel
n: Austin institution in a hacienda. Duck enchiladas are iconic.
addr: 2330 W North Loop Blvd, Austin TX

name: Suerte

name: Launderette

name: BOA Steakhouse
n: Upscale steakhouse with LA vibe but Texas warmth.

name: Loro Asian Smokehouse

name: Uchi Austin
n: The OG. Where Tyson Cole started it all. Still one of Austin's best.

name: Home Slice Pizza

name: Show Me Pizza

name: Stiles Switch BBQ

name: la Barbecue

name: Elizabeth Street Cafe

name: Cenote
n: Iconic East Austin cafe with a beautiful back patio.

name: Cuantos Tacos

name: T-Loc's Sonora

name: Bird Bird Biscuit

name: Counter Cafe
n: Classic East Austin diner. Best coffee in town. All-day breakfast.

name: Snooze AM Eatery
n: Creative breakfast classics. Pancake flights and Benedicts are the move.

name: Flower Child
n: Feel-good healthy bowls. Perfect for groups with mixed dietary needs.

name: Kome Sushi Kitchen
n: Neighborhood gem. Crunchy Dynamite roll is a crowd favorite.

name: Musashino Sushi

name: Thai Fresh

name: Sangam Chettinad

name: Pho Phong Luu

name: Din Ho Chinese BBQ

name: Dan's Hamburgers

name: North Italia (Domain)

name: El Tacorrido

name: Peace Bakery & Deli

addr: 11220 N Lamar Blvd B202, Austin TX

name: Machi Sushi AYCE
n: All-you-can-eat sushi with robot delivery and Transformer statues.
addr: 2200 S I-35 Frontage Rd, Austin TX

name: Valentina's Tex Mex
n: The Real Deal Holyfield breakfast taco. Worth the drive.

name: Micklethwait Craft BBQ
n: Craft BBQ from a trailer. Brisket and jalapeño cheese grits.

name: Paperboy
n: The best breakfast sandwich in Austin. Always worth the line.

name: Sour Duck Market
n: Dog & kid-friendly. Wagyu smash burgers and house-baked bread.
addr: 1814 E MLK Jr Blvd, Austin TX

name: Upstairs at Caroline
n: Rooftop bar with foosball, Jenga, pool, fire pits. Great views.

name: Nido Rooftop
n: Stunning rooftop at the Loren Hotel with panoramic Austin views.

name: Poeta
n: Intimate Italian at East Austin Hotel. Carbonara is perfection.

name: Hippie PicNik

name: Tyson's Tacos
n: Cash only, no frills, legendary breakfast tacos.

name: ATX Cocina
n: Modern Mexican with handcrafted margaritas. Very photogenic.

name: Juan in a Million
n: The Don Juan breakfast taco is an Austin institution since 1981.
addr: 2300 E Cesar Chavez St, Austin TX

name: Honest Mary's
n: Healthy bowls done right. Great aqua fresca and honey chicken bowl.

name: Sapori Italian Roots
n: Handmade pasta and family-style warmth in the heart of downtown.

name: Geraldine's
n: Live music, craft cocktails, and flawlessly composed dishes.

name: JewBoy Burgers
n: House-made pastrami burgers and smoked mayo. Truly legendary.

name: Sangam Chettinad (NW)
n: Best South Indian in Austin. Consistently packed for good reason.

name: Geraldine's (Hotel VZ)
n: Rooftop live music on Rainey Street. Cocktails and views are stunning.
